description.zh-CN: 将箱子放在机器（如熔炉或宝石复制机）旁边，机器便会自动从箱子中取出原料，并将加工完成的成品放回箱中。你还可以通过箱子连接多台机器，让它们联动工作。
description.source: Place a chest next to a machine (like a furnace or crystalarium), and the machine will automatically pull raw items from the chest and push processed items into it. Connect multiple machines with a chest to link them.
